## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between TrueMed and GrowthX for marketing and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [TrueMed: Series A fintech enabling HSA/FSA spending on preventive health products; $20M run rate, 60% margins](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [GrowthX: Modern content/growth agency using AI+human workflows to drive organic traffic/awareness](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [TrueMed seeks marketing expertise; current efforts are nascent and underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [GrowthX offers content strategy, creation, and distribution services starting at $15K/mo](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Topics

### TrueMed Overview

  - [Series A fintech, raised from Indrecent in Feb](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [$20M current run rate, projecting $60M EOY](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Enables HSA/FSA spending on preventive health products (e.g., Peloton)](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [B2B2C model with 7% avg take rate; 55-60% gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Recently launched marketplace-style website](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### TrueMed's Marketing Challenges

  - [Lack of internal growth/marketing expertise](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Minimal CRO, SEM, SEO efforts to date](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Fractional CMO recently brought on](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Current content agency (Healthy-ish) underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Seeking to build acquisition funnel, drive repeat purchases](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### GrowthX Services

  - [AI+human workflows for content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Focus: driving organic awareness/traffic via Google and LLM mentions](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Content strategy, creation, optimization, and refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Distribution across web, social, Reddit, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Base package: $25K strategy sprint, then $15K/mo](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Can assist with site structure/development if needed](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)

### Potential Partnership

  - [TrueMed needs marketing execution support](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [GrowthX could provide content strategy and creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage TrueMed's merchant relationships for content](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [TrueMed plans to hire head of marketing in \~4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send additional info/decks to Tiffany](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Explore possibility of Justin (TrueMed) attending GrowthX event in SF](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [Tiffany to review materials and discuss internally with Justin](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [Follow-up to determine if partnership is a good fit for both parties](https://fathom.video/share/gdbLLz555ovFsV2kEyf2boKKymQ5mJLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
